title: PDF Viewer stack reflow after crop
description:
Crop and gap changes now re-stack all viewer pages (fixes huge grey void between sheets). Normalized layout always persisted on load/render. Inter-page background restored to subtle grey; white is sheet paper only.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg66).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Reflow viewer stack after crop apply — pages move together.
Always normalize + persist page Y positions on load/render.
Grey gap between sheets (not white); crop persists on refresh.
Gap slider uses same reflow path.
